# SOC Analyst Portfolio - Setup Instructions

This is a Next.js portfolio website designed for cybersecurity professionals applying to SOC analyst roles.

## Project Overview
- **Framework**: Next.js with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with dark mode support
- **Features**: Responsive design, modern UI, project showcase, skills display

## Current Status
- [x] Project initialized
- [ ] Customization in progress
- [ ] Ready for deployment

## Running the Project
```bash
npm run dev
# Visit http://localhost:3000
```
